name: Liquid Avatar Technologies Inc.
summary: KABN Systems NA Holdings Corp., through its subsidiary, KABN Systems North America Inc, focuses on the verification, management, and monetization of digital identity. The company develops and operates KABN ID, a blockchain and biometric based patent-pending digital identity validation and verification platform allowing users to prove their identity to the online community; Liquid Avatar that allows users to create digital icons representing their online personas; KABN Card, a Visa approved prepaid card program allowing users to manage digital and fiat currencies and earn cashback and other loyalty incentives ; and KABN KASH, a cashback, loyalty, and engagement program. The company is based in Markham, Canada.
